title: Half Cover
excerpt: Half cover provides partial protection when an obstacle screens at least half of a target's body.
markdown:
# Half Cover

Half cover represents partial physical screening by an intervening object, creature, or obstacle. It offers a modest degree of protection against direct attacks and spatial effects.

## Environmental Context

A target has half cover if an obstacle blocks at least half of its physical form from the source of an attack or effect. Examples include a low wall, a pile of rubble, a thick tree trunk, or another creature standing in the path of the effect.

## Tactical Protection

- provides a +2 bonus to [[armor_class|Armor Class (AC)]]
- provides a +2 bonus to [[dexterity|Dexterity]] saving throws

## Targeting Dynamics

Half cover does not prevent a source from targeting a creature directly, but the physical obstruction makes finding a clear path or clean hit more difficult. It scales into [[three_quarters_cover|Three-Quarters Cover]] as the barrier becomes more prominent.
